item.kick_mode: Allow multi-end login on the same device
item.is_hide_msg_before_join_group: Fetch history sent before joining a group
item.not_check_grp_member: Allow non-members to fetch group messages

domainDialog.title: Security domains
domainDialog.hint: Enter security domains separated by semicolons. Clear the field and save to remove all configured domains.
domainDialog.warning: After security domains are configured, Web clients can only connect to IM Server from the allowed domains. Use with caution in production.
